name: Spider-Man
bio: Peter Parker became Spider-Man after being bitten by a radioactive spider.

name: Iron Man
bio: Tony Stark, a billionaire industrialist and genius inventor, created a powered suit of armor to save his life.

name: Thor
bio: The God of Thunder from Asgard, Thor wields the enchanted hammer Mjolnir.

name: Hulk
bio: After being exposed to massive amounts of gamma radiation, scientist Bruce Banner transforms into the monstrous Hulk.

name: Doctor Strange
bio: Once a brilliant but arrogant surgeon, Stephen Strange lost the use of his hands in an accident.

name: Captain America
bio: Steve Rogers, a frail young man enhanced to the peak of human perfection by an experimental serum.

name: Batman
bio: After witnessing the murder of his parents, Bruce Wayne swore vengeance against criminals.

name: Superman
bio: Born Kal-El on the dying planet Krypton, he was sent to Earth where he uses his incredible powers to protect his adopted home.

name: Wonder Woman
bio: Diana, princess of the Amazons, trained to be an unconquerable warrior.

name: Flash
bio: Barry Allen gained super speed after being struck by lightning and doused in chemicals.

name: Aquaman
bio: Arthur Curry is the King of Atlantis. He is half-human and half-Atlantean.

name: Joker
bio: A criminal mastermind with a clown-like appearance, the Joker is Batman's greatest enemy.
